creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
Update for dns-proxy-tor from 0.0.9 to 0.1.0. 

No important changes for FreeBSD users,
Tor users can read the changelog at:  
http://p56soo2ibjkx23xo.onion/changelog

Additionally the WWW URL in pkg-descr
is fixed. One "http://" is enough.

Fix: 

http://www.fabiankeil.de/sourcecode/freebsd/dns-proxy-tor-0.1.0.diff
